name: side_glyph_right_range

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.16 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] ［＃行右小書き］ ... ［＃行右小書き終わり］ is the bare-range form of the small right-side script glyph (the container counterpart of the forward-reference 「X」は行右小書き leaf); it renders to the same inline aozora-kogaki-right span. ~4k paired occurrences in the corpus. Offsets from the §3 byte model; expected captured from the aozora #114/#118 reference implementation (the project's canonical processor).

source: あ［＃行右小書き］いう［＃行右小書き終わり］え

expected.serialize: あ［＃行右小書き］いう［＃行右小書き終わり］え
